business_ideas.idea: Creator Camp: fund cinematic videos/movies with 100-200k budgets for theatrical/viral release
For-profit media and marketing college teaching video, podcasting, editing, animation, sound design

predictions.text: Cinematic-style video creators will significantly outperform and dominate within 2 years
Demand for high-quality video content far exceeds supply of skilled creators globally
Video is the native language of the internet and will dominate all media consumption
Different and cinematic is better than better in content marketing strategy
